summary: Iteration 8 — Society logo/UPI/Bank on invoices. Verified backend PATCH/GET /api/society, POST /api/files/upload, GET /api/files/{id}/download, and full frontend flow (Society settings dialog with 3 tabs, sidebar society logo, invoice view with generated + uploaded QR, bank block, copy buttons, resident access to /app/invoices/:id, admin-only sidebar-society-settings, paid vs unpaid conditional sections). Everything works end-to-end. Two minor backend gaps found in strict spec compliance (documented below); frontend is unaffected because it always sends full form payload.

minor.issue: For pre-existing singleton doc that was created before new fields were added, GET does NOT return the new keys (logo_file_id, upi_qr_file_id, bank_*, upi_id) — they are simply missing from the response. _get_society() only injects defaults when doc doesn't exist; it does not merge defaults for missing keys on existing docs. Spec says these fields should be present (may be null). Frontend handles missing keys via `|| ''` so functionally works, but future integrators may break.

SocietyIn requires `name: str = Field(min_length=1)`. Any partial PATCH omitting `name` returns 422. Spec says an empty string should clear a value; this is only possible when the payload ALSO includes name. Recommend making name Optional in SocietyIn (validation only when explicitly set to empty/None).

action_items: (Optional) In backend/server.py _get_society(): merge default None for any missing keys (logo_file_id, upi_id, upi_qr_file_id, bank_name, bank_account_number, bank_account_holder, bank_ifsc) before returning existing doc.
(Optional) Make SocietyIn.name Optional so partial PATCH works per spec (empty-string clear semantics work already when name is included).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1686 lines — should be split into modules (auth, society, files, invoices, expenses, amenities) for maintainability.
download_file returns FastAPIResponse with content-type from either rec['content_type'] or fallback ct — good. No cache-control headers though; consider adding for logo/QR images to reduce load.
SocietySettingsDialog.jsx frontend uses `|| ''` and `|| null` conversions on submit — robust. But no client-side IFSC/UPI validation; consider light regex checks.

success_rate.backend: 50% (3/6 pytest — 3 minor spec gaps as documented; core APIs 100% functional)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all specified testids present, all flows work incl. admin+resident)

seed_data_creation: None. Used existing Green Valley Residency society. Uploaded a 1x1 test PNG for logo and QR during runtime.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend testids present: sidebar-society-settings, settings-tab-general/payment/bank, society-upload-logo, society-logo-preview, society-remove-logo, society-upi-input, society-upload-qr, society-qr-preview, society-remove-qr, society-bank-holder-input, society-bank-name-input, society-bank-ifsc-input, society-bank-account-input, society-save-btn, sidebar-society-logo, view-invoice-<id>, invoice-sheet, invoice-society-logo, invoice-society-name, invoice-total, invoice-status-chip, invoice-upi-section, invoice-qr-generated (svg viewBox 0 0 37 37 confirmed), invoice-qr-uploaded (uploaded takes precedence), invoice-bank-section, invoice-copy-account, invoice-copy-ifsc, invoice-copy-upi, invoice-no-payment-info. Uploaded QR is currently stored on society; auto-generated QR path was verified by removing uploaded QR mid-test. Resident cannot see Society settings sidebar button (verified) but can view any invoice via /app/invoices/:id.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bug to root-cause. Two minor spec deviations documented above (partial PATCH requires name field; GET does not merge default None for missing keys on legacy DB docs). Both are non-blocking since frontend always sends the full form and reads missing keys defensively.
